mapper.insert: insert into activity_plan (plan_name, min_age, max_age, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status,cover_url, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{planName}, #{minAge}, #{maxAge}, #{activityCategory}, #{season}, #{duration}, #{scene}, #{status},#{coverUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update activity_plan
plan_name=#{planName},
min_age=#{minAge},
max_age=#{maxAge},
activity_category=#{activityCategory},
season=#{season},
duration=#{duration},
scene=#{scene},
status=#{status},
cover_url= #{coverUrl},
update_time=#{updateTime},
update_user=#{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, plan_name, min_age, max_age, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status,cover_url, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from activity_plan where id = #{id}

select id, plan_name, min_age, max_age, activity_category, season, duration, scene, status,cover_url, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from activity_plan where (season & #{season})!=0
